# unique

Returns a list with duplicate values removed, preserving first occurrence order.

```rad
unique(_list: any[]) -> any[]
```

```rad
unique([2, 1, 2, 3, 1, 3, 4])  // -> [2, 1, 3, 4]
unique(["a", "b", "a", "c"])    // -> ["a", "b", "c"]
```
